name: AI Agent
description: AI agent and chat blocks with tool calling, for Claude, OpenAI-compatible endpoints, or your local Ollama models

llm.name: Ask AI
llm.description: Send a prompt to an LLM and emit the completion

call-tool.name: Call Tool
call-tool.description: Invoke a hub-registered tool by id and emit its result

agent.name: AI Agent
agent.description: LLM agent that reasons and calls tools to answer each prompt

anthropicApiKey.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropicApiKey.description: Your Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...). Setting it enables Claude models in every AI block. Stored securely in the OS keychain.

openaiApiKey.title: OpenAI API Key
openaiApiKey.description: Your OpenAI (or OpenAI-compatible) API key. Setting it enables those models in every AI block. Stored securely in the OS keychain.

openaiBaseUrl.title: OpenAI-compatible Base URL
openaiBaseUrl.description: Optional. Point the OpenAI key at a compatible endpoint (OpenRouter, Groq, Azure...). Defaults to api.openai.com.

ollamaBaseUrl.title: Ollama Server
ollamaBaseUrl.description: Optional. Your local Ollama server; defaults to http://localhost:11434. Installed models appear automatically when the server is running.

ask-claude.name: Ask Claude
ask-claude.description: Ask Claude a question and get a text answer. Call for open-ended reasoning, summarization, drafting, or classification.
